ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographical region of the country (e.g., Europe, Asia, Americas) */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level of the country (e.g., high-income, middle-income, low-income) */,
  "government_type" TEXT /* Type of government (e.g., democratic, authoritarian, monarchical) */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Official currency of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Estimated population of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leave_policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leave policy */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the policy belongs to */,
  "policy_type" TEXT /* Type of leave policy (e.g., maternity, paternity, parental, adoption) */,
  "maternity_leave_weeks" INTEGER /* Number of weeks of maternity leave offered */,
  "maternity_leave_pay" TEXT /* Percentage of pay during maternity leave */,
  "paternity_leave_weeks" INTEGER /* Number of weeks of paternity leave offered */,
  "paternity_leave_pay" TEXT /* Percentage of pay during paternity leave */,
  "parental_leave_weeks" INTEGER /* Number of weeks of parental leave offered */,
  "parental_leave_pay" TEXT /* Percentage of pay during parental leave */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the leave policy became effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the leave policy expires or needs to be renewed */,
  "eligibility_criteria" TEXT /* Description of the eligibility criteria for the leave policy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leave_policies_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources_of_payment" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source of payment */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the source of payment (e.g., Social security, Employer liability) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the source of payment */,
  "payment_structure" TEXT /* Description of the payment structure for the source (e.g., fixed amount, percentage of salary) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leave_policy_sources" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the leave policy */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source of payment */,
  "payment_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage of payment provided by the source */,
  "payment_cap" TEXT /* Maximum payment amount provided by the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id", "source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leave_policy_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the leave policy updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the update was made */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "update_type" TEXT /* Type of update (e.g., policy change, payment adjustment) */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the update became effective */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leave_policy_updates_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES leave_policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leave_policy_regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., Europe, Asia, Americas) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leave_policy_region_xrefs" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the leave policy */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id", "region_id")
)
